title: Comparative analysis of type-2 diabetes outcomes in Finland and the Netherlands 2018-2023
projectDescription: Cross-national cohort study comparing long-term complications and treatment pathways for type-2 diabetes patients in Finland and the Netherlands, leveraging routine primary care and hospital data from both countries.
requestedVariables: Age, sex, diabetes diagnosis date (ICD-10 E11), HbA1c, BMI, medication (ATC A10), hospitalisations, complications (ICD-10 E110-E149)
studyPopulation: Adults aged 18+ with a diagnosis of type-2 diabetes registered in Dutch general practices
inclusionCriteria: Age ≥18, ICD-10 E11 diagnosis confirmed, registered ≥1 year
exclusionCriteria: Type-1 diabetes, opt-out from research use
